blocks.text: Masters Sunday: McIlroy at -12, Hovland chasing Augusta history

McIlroy leads by six strokes — but Hovland and Reitan need magic at Augusta to rewrite the script. Meanwhile Paris-Roubaix brings the cobbled carnage and Ruud hunts Monte-Carlo clay glory. Clear the calendar.
⛳ Masters Tournament final round — McIlroy leads at -12, Hovland and Reitan in pursuit at Augusta
🎾 Monte-Carlo Masters — Ruud tees up as a genuine title contender on his favourite clay
🏅 Paris-Roubaix — Wærenskjold and Abrahamsen attack Hell of the North's cobblestones
